V Automation System
Who We Are

Building the Future of Automation

V Automation System is a New Delhi-based technology company specializing in IT solutions and Building Management System (BMS) automation. We design, implement, and maintain smart infrastructure systems that optimize energy efficiency, security, and operational control for commercial and residential environments.

From HVAC control systems to integrated fire safety networks and structured cabling, we bring expertise across a wide spectrum of building technologies. Our team is committed to delivering solutions that are not only technically robust, but also intuitive and easy to manage.

🏗️
BMS Integration
Unified building control for HVAC, lighting, fire & security.
🖧
IT Infrastructure
Structured cabling, networking & server room setups.
🔒
Security Systems
CCTV, access control and surveillance integration.
Our Work

Featured Projects

A selection of our landmark deployments across IT infrastructure and BMS automation — each built to perform, scale, and endure.

MP Flat at BKS Marg
Project for the Honourable MP of our country, featuring 2200+ Data/Voice points, 600+ CCTV cameras, along with advanced BMS and Access Control systems.
DATAEPABXCCTVACCESSBMS
Delhi Technological University
High-value infrastructure project with 600+ CCTV cameras and centralized monitoring, 3000+ Data/Voice points, and 200+ WiFi access points across the campus.
DATAEPABXCCTVBMS
Sankalp Bhawan
Integrated security and networking project with 3500+ Data/Voice points, 350+ CCTV cameras, Access Control, Boom Barriers, BFMD, Bag Scanner, and Bollards.
DATAEPABXACCESS CONTROLBOOM BARRIERCCTV
ICMR-NITM Belagavi
It was an Honour and Privilege to serve one of the Nation’s Premier Research Institutions by designing and deploying a Secure and Seliable network for over 300 Scientists and Scholars. The infrastructure was built with a strong focus on Redundancy, DATA Protection, and High-Level Security to ensure uninterrupted research operations.
DATACCTVSECURITYREDUNDANCY
IDBI Zonal Office
Delivered a comprehensive infrastructure solution for IDBI’s secure banking environment, covering everything from Electrical systems to Data Networking. The project included Data Networking, Fire Alarm, HVAC, Access Control, and CCTV systems, ensuring seamless integration across all layers—from high voltage to low voltage—with a strong focus on reliability, safety, and security.
ELECTRICALDATACCTVFIRE ALARMACCESS
New Parliament House
Prestige Honour to serve the Nation’s Parliament.
ELECTRICALPOLESLIGHTING
